2604.11129.title: DeCoVec: Building Decoding Space based Task Vector for Large Language Models via In-Context Learning
2604.11129.paper_summary: Task vectors, representing directions in model or activation spaces that encode task-specific behaviors, have emerged as a promising tool for steering large language models (LLMs). However, existing approaches typically require fine-tuning or invasive manipulation of internal states, limiting their flexibility and scalability. We propose \textsc{DeCoVec} (Decoding Space based Task Vector), a training-free and non-invasive framework that constructs task vectors directly in the \textit{decoding space} by leveraging in-context learning (ICL). Specifically, \textsc{DeCoVec} captures the task essence as the difference between the output logit distributions of few-shot and zero-shot prompts, then steers generation by injecting this vector into the decoding process. Experiments across seven LLMs (0.5B--9B) on TruthfulQA, Math-500, and AQUA-RAT show that \textsc{DeCoVec} consistently outperforms standard few-shot baselines, with gains up to +5.50 average accuracy. Further analysis demonstrates that \textsc{DeCoVec} effectively suppresses generation degeneration and logical flaws while exhibiting strong robustness to demonstration ordering, all without incurring additional input token costs. Our method offers a training-free and non-invasive solution for LLM steering without requiring weight updates or auxiliary models.
2604.11129.paper_summary_zh: 任務向量，代表模型或激活空間中的方向，編碼特定任務的行為，已成為引導大型語言模型（LLMs）的有前景工具。然而，現有的方法通常需要微調或侵入性地操控內部狀態，限制了它們的靈活性和可擴展性。我們提出了\textsc{DeCoVec}（基於解碼空間的任務向量），這是一個無需訓練且非侵入性的框架，通過利用上下文學習（ICL）直接在\textit{解碼空間}中構建任務向量。具體而言，\textsc{DeCoVec}將任務本質捕捉為少量樣本和零樣本提示的輸出logit分佈之間的差異，然後通過將這個向量注入解碼過程來引導生成。在TruthfulQA、Math-500和AQUA-RAT上的七個LLM（0.5B--9B）實驗顯示，\textsc{DeCoVec}始終超越標準的少量樣本基準，平均準確率提升高達+5.50。進一步分析表明，\textsc{DeCoVec}有效抑制生成退化和邏輯缺陷，同時對示範順序表現出強大的穩健性，且無需增加額外的輸入標記成本。我們的方法提供了一種無需訓練且非侵入性的LLM引導解決方案，無需權重更新或輔助模型。
2604.11129.author: Feiyang Li et.al.
